title: elymus sinicus
intro: Elymus sinicus, also known as the Chinese wild rye or wild rye, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Elymus sinicus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and improving digestion. Elymus sinicus can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its extracts can be used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
